statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); unstaged=$(git -C "$cwd" diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); untracked=$(git -C "$cwd" ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null); out=''; [ -n "$unstaged" ] && out="Unstaged: $(echo "$unstaged" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//')"; [ -n "$untracked" ] && { [ -n "$out" ] && out="$out | "; out="${out}Untracked: $(echo "$untracked" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//')"; }; [ -n "$out" ] && echo "$out" || echo "No changes"
